aboutPreview.label: Who We Are
aboutPreview.title: Welcome to PURISTINE IMPEX LLP
aboutPreview.p1: Puristine Impex LLP is one of the leading names in India's exporters, importers, and suppliers of modern eco-friendly products, all kinds of foodstuff, spices, and general merchandise designed for today's generation and a sustainable future.
aboutPreview.p2: We prioritize the needs of our customers and strive to provide the best in the market. We focus on user satisfaction to achieve our goals.

categoriesPreview.pulses: Edible seeds of plants in the legume family. Pulses grow in pods and come in a variety of shapes, sizes, and colors.
categoriesPreview.instant-mixes: Consisting of ingredients blended in advance, especially of food that is ready to cook or eat after addition of milk or water.
categoriesPreview.spices: Seed, fruit, root, bark, or other plant substance primarily used for flavoring or coloring food.

about.title: About Puristine Impex
about.subtitle: Heritage, expertise, and a vision for global trade excellence.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: From Puristine Foods to Global Impex
story.p1: Puristine Impex LLP was born from the trusted foundation of Puristine Foods — a name synonymous with quality in Indian food products.
story.p2: Recognizing growing international demand, we expanded our operations to serve exporters, distributors, and retailers across continents with the same integrity that built our domestic reputation.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Delivering Excellence Across Borders
mission.text: To connect global markets with premium Indian food products and innovative home-care solutions through ethical sourcing, reliable logistics, and customer-first partnerships.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: A Trusted Global Trade Partner
vision.text: To be the preferred B2B export partner for discerning buyers worldwide — known for quality, transparency, and sustainable growth.

expertise.label: Expertise
expertise.title: Global Trade Excellence
expertise.text: Our team brings decades of combined experience in FMCG export, quality assurance, and international compliance — ensuring smooth transactions from inquiry to delivery.

commitment.label: Commitment
commitment.title: Quality Without Compromise
commitment.text: Every product we export reflects our commitment to food safety, consistent specifications, and packaging that meets international retail standards.

growth.label: Future Growth
growth.title: Expanding Horizons
growth.text: With Fairewash home-care innovations and an ever-growing product catalog, we continue investing in categories that meet evolving global consumer trends.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Start your export inquiry — our team responds within one business day.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.exportText: Looking to source products for your market? Tell us your requirements — MOQ, packaging, and destination — and we'll prepare a tailored proposal.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Puristine Impex LLP respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit our website or contact us for business inquiries.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Puristine Impex LLP website. By accessing this site, you agree to these terms in full.

ecoFriendly.title: Eco - Friendly Products
ecoFriendly.metaDescription: Faire Wash eco-friendly cleaning products — laundry and floor detergent sheets. Sustainable home care by Puristine Impex LLP.

about.p1: Faire Wash is an innovative home-care brand committed to redefining the future of cleaning through eco-friendly, sustainable, and efficient solutions.
about.p2: We combine nature-inspired ingredients with modern cleaning technology to develop products that deliver powerful performance while minimizing environmental impact. Our mission is to simplify everyday cleaning while promoting a healthier home and a cleaner planet.
about.p3: Faire Wash products are designed to replace traditional bulky detergents with compact, smart, and sustainable alternatives that reduce plastic waste and carbon footprint.
about.p4: From laundry care to floor care and upcoming eco-friendly household solutions, Faire Wash is building a new generation of responsible cleaning products for modern homes worldwide.

deliver.title: What We Deliver
deliver.subtitle: Sustainable Cleaning Solutions
deliver.description: Innovative, eco-friendly cleaning products designed to deliver powerful performance while reducing environmental impact.

laundry.title: 1. Laundry Detergent Sheets
laundry.desc: Ultra-concentrated detergent sheets that dissolve instantly in water, delivering powerful stain removal while remaining gentle on fabrics and the environment. Designed for modern laundry with zero waste and maximum convenience.
laundry.h2: Works in front load & top load machines

floor.title: 2. Floor Cleaning Sheets
floor.desc: Eco-friendly floor cleaning sheets that dissolve quickly in water to create an effective cleaning solution. Tough on dirt and stains while being safe for homes, families, and all floor surfaces.
floor.h4: Suitable for marble, tiles, granite, vinyl & wooden floors

ecoFriendly.comingSoon: More sustainable home care solutions coming soon as part of the growing Faire Wash eco-cleaning range.

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.text: To make cleaning smarter, safer, and more sustainable for households by developing innovative cleaning solutions that reduce environmental impact without compromising performance.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become a globally trusted eco-friendly home care brand, delivering innovative cleaning technologies that promote sustainable living and responsible consumption.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Faire Wash
whyChoose.intro: Faire Wash combines innovation and sustainability to deliver the future of eco-friendly cleaning.
whyChoose.subintro: Six compelling reasons to switch to smarter, eco-friendly cleaning.

r1.title: Instant Dissolve Technology
r1.desc: Advanced sheet technology that dissolves quickly in water, ensuring efficient cleaning without residue or detergent buildup.

r2.title: Proudly Made in India
r2.desc: Manufactured in India with modern technology and high-quality standards designed for households across the world.

r3.title: Plant-Based Ingredients
r3.desc: Made with plant-derived ingredients that deliver powerful cleaning while being environmentally responsible.

r4.title: Compact Space-Saving Design
r4.desc: Compact, lightweight sheets eliminate bulky detergent bottles and save valuable storage space.

r5.title: Eco-Friendly Cleaning
r5.desc: Designed to reduce plastic waste and support sustainable cleaning practices.

r6.title: Fully Biodegradable Formula
r6.desc: Formulated to break down naturally, helping protect water systems and the environment.

smarter.title: A Smarter Alternative to Traditional Detergents
smarter.subtitle: Switch to smarter, sustainable cleaning.
smarter.intro: Traditional liquid detergents come in bulky plastic bottles and require large amounts of water for transportation. Faire Wash detergent sheets offer a compact, lightweight, and eco-friendly alternative that helps reduce waste and environmental impact.

r1.title: Less Plastic Waste
r1.desc: Compact packaging eliminates bulky plastic detergent bottles.

r2.title: Reduced Carbon Footprint
r2.desc: Lightweight detergent sheets reduce transportation emissions.

r3.title: No Overuse of Detergent
r3.desc: Pre-measured sheets ensure the right amount every time.

r4.title: Easy Storage & Travel Friendly
r4.desc: Ultra-light packaging takes minimal space and is convenient for travel.

commitment.p1: Faire Wash is committed to transforming everyday cleaning into a more sustainable and responsible choice. Our innovative sheet-based solutions help reduce plastic waste, minimize environmental impact, and simplify cleaning for modern homes.
commitment.p2: By choosing Faire Wash, you are not just cleaning your home — you are contributing to a cleaner planet.

movement.title: Join the Sustainable Cleaning Movement
movement.subtitle: Together, we can create cleaner homes and a healthier planet.
movement.p1: Interested in learning more about Faire Wash products? Whether you are a customer looking for product information or a business interested in distribution and partnership opportunities, our team is ready to assist you.
movement.p2: We welcome inquiries from distributors, retailers, and businesses looking to bring sustainable cleaning solutions to their customers.

solutions.title: Eco-Friendly Cleaning Solutions for Modern Homes
solutions.p1: We welcome inquiries from distributors, retailers, and businesses looking to bring sustainable cleaning solutions to their customers.
solutions.closing1: Committed to delivering eco-friendly cleaning solutions with quality, innovation, and sustainability.
solutions.closing2: Join the growing network of partners bringing sustainable cleaning solutions to modern households.

laundrySheets.title: Laundry Detergent Sheets
laundrySheets.intro: Ultra-concentrated detergent sheets that dissolve instantly in water, delivering powerful stain removal while remaining gentle on fabrics and the environment. Designed for modern laundry with zero waste and maximum convenience.
laundrySheets.benefitsTitle: Key Benefits of Faire Wash Laundry Sheets
laundrySheets.benefitsSubtitle: Powerful cleaning performance with a compact, eco-friendly detergent sheet designed for modern laundry

b1.title: Powerful Stain Removal
b1.desc: Advanced cleaning formula effectively removes tough stains, dirt, and odors with ease.

b2.title: Machine & Hand Wash Friendly
b2.desc: Works perfectly in front load machines, top load machines, and hand washing.

b3.title: Effective in Hot & Cold Water
b3.desc: Delivers reliable cleaning performance in both hot and cold wash cycles.

b4.title: Gentle on Fabrics
b4.desc: Carefully formulated to protect delicate fabrics and everyday clothing.

b5.title: Low Foaming Formula
b5.desc: Optimized low-foam technology ensures efficient rinsing and cleaner results.

b6.title: Enzyme Powered Cleaning
b6.desc: Advanced enzyme technology helps break down stubborn stains and organic dirt.

b7.title: Ultra-Concentrated Formula
b7.desc: High-performance formula provides maximum cleaning with minimal product use.

b8.title: Plastic-Free Cleaning
b8.desc: Compact sheet format eliminates bulky plastic detergent bottles and reduces waste.

laundrySheets.howTitle: How Faire Wash Detergent Sheets Work
laundrySheets.howDesc: Experience a smarter way to do laundry with ultra-light detergent sheets designed for powerful cleaning and zero waste.

s1.title: 1. Place the Sheet
s1.a: Place detergent sheet directly into the washing machine drum.
s1.b: Ultra-thin sheet begins dissolving instantly in water.

s2.title: 2. Add Your Laundry
s2.a: Load your clothes on top of the sheet and close the machine as usual.
s2.b: No measuring. No mess. No detergent spills.

s3.title: 3. Start the Wash Cycle
s3.a: Select your preferred wash program. The sheet dissolves completely and releases powerful cleaning agents.
s3.b: Works in both front load and top load machines.

s4.title: 4. Enjoy Fresh Results
s4.a: Remove clean, fresh clothes with no residue, no plastic waste, and no heavy detergent bottles.

laundrySheets.tagline: Compact. Powerful. Eco-friendly cleaning for modern homes.

d1.title: Small Load
d1.desc: 1/2 Sheet for light laundry loads (about 3.5 kg). Suitable for regular daily washing.

d2.title: Medium Load
d2.desc: 1 Sheet for normal laundry loads (about 7 kg).

d3.title: Large Load
d3.desc: 1.5 Sheets for heavier laundry loads (about 10 kg).

d4.title: Extra Large / Heavy Load
d4.desc: 2–3 Sheets for very large loads or heavily soiled clothes.

laundrySheets.useTitle: How to Use Faire Wash Laundry Detergent Sheets
laundrySheets.useP1: Experience the future of laundry with Faire Wash Laundry Detergent Sheets. Just take a sheet, put it inside the washing machine or bucket, and let it dissolve instantly for powerful cleaning.
laundrySheets.useP2: Make your laundry routine smarter, cleaner, and more convenient with Faire Wash.

floorSheets.title: Floor Cleaning Sheets
floorSheets.intro: Eco-friendly floor cleaning sheets that dissolve quickly in water to create an effective cleaning solution. Tough on dirt and stains while being safe for homes, families, and all floor surfaces.
floorSheets.benefitsTitle: Key Benefits of Faire Wash Floor Cleaning Sheets
floorSheets.benefitsSubtitle: Smart, eco-friendly floor cleaning designed for modern homes.

b1.title: Non-Toxic Formula
b1.desc: Safe, non-toxic cleaning solution designed for everyday household use.

b2.title: Cruelty-Free
b2.desc: Never tested on animals and developed with responsible practices.

b3.title: No Harsh Chemicals
b3.desc: Free from aggressive chemicals that can damage floors or irritate skin.

b4.title: Paraben-Free
b4.desc: Formulated without parabens or harmful preservatives.

b5.title: Fresh, Pleasant Fragrance
b5.desc: Leaves floors smelling fresh without the strong phenyl odor.

b6.title: Safe for Kids & Pets
b6.desc: Gentle formula suitable for homes with children and pets.

b7.title: Effective Germ Removal
b7.desc: Helps reduce germs and bacteria while cleaning.

b8.title: Suitable for Multiple Floor Types
b8.desc: Works effectively on marble, tiles, granite, vinyl, and wooden floors.

floorSheets.howTitle: How Faire Wash Floor Cleaning Sheets Work
floorSheets.howDesc1: A smarter and eco-friendly way to clean your floors in just a few simple steps.
floorSheets.howDesc2: Powerful cleaning performance with environmentally responsible ingredients.

s1.title: 1. Dissolve in Water
s1.a: Drop half a floor cleaning sheet into a bucket containing approximately 5 litres of water.
s1.b: The sheet dissolves quickly to form an effective cleaning solution.

s2.title: 2. Mop Your Floor
s2.a: Dip the mop into the prepared solution and clean the floor as usual.
s2.b: The advanced formula helps remove dirt, stains, and grime easily.

s3.title: 3. No Rinsing Required
s3.a: The specially formulated solution leaves no sticky residue.
s3.b: There is no need for rinsing after mopping.

s4.title: 4. Enjoy Clean Floors
s4.a: Allow the floor to air dry naturally and enjoy sparkling clean, fresh, and residue-free floors.

floorSheets.useTitle: How to Use Faire Wash Floor Cleaning Sheets
floorSheets.useP1: Make floor cleaning simple with Faire Wash Floor Cleaning Sheets. Just dissolve a sheet in water and enjoy quick, effective, and hassle-free cleaning for your home or workspace.
floorSheets.useP2: Upgrade your daily cleaning routine with Faire Wash.
